mapper.select:
select b.* from (select a.*, rownum rn from (select p.*, l.lprod_id "lprod.lprodId", l.lprod_gu "lprod.lprodGu", l.lprod_name "lprod.lprodName", b.buyer_id "buyer.buyerId", b.buyer_name "buyer.buyerName" from prod p inner join lprod l on p.lprod_gu = l.lprod_gu inner join buyer b on p.buyer_id = b.buyer_id order by l.lprod_gu asc, prod_id desc ) a) b
where b.rn between #{startRow} and #{endRow}

select a.*, rownum rnum from (select p.*, l.lprod_id "lprod.lprodId", l.lprod_gu "lprod.lprodGu", l.lprod_name "lprod.lprodName", b.buyer_id "buyer.buyerId", b.buyer_name "buyer.buyerName" from prod p inner join lprod l on p.lprod_gu = l.lprod_gu inner join buyer b on p.buyer_id = b.buyer_id
order by l.lprod_gu asc, prod_id desc ) a offset #{offset} rows fetch next #{screenSize} rows only
select count(*) from prod p inner join lprod l on p.lprod_gu = l.lprod_gu inner join buyer b on p.buyer_id = b.buyer_id

select p.*, l.lprod_id "lprod.lprodId", l.lprod_gu "lprod.lprodGu", l.lprod_name "lprod.lprodName", b.buyer_id "buyer.buyerId", b.buyer_name "buyer.buyerName", b.buyer_comtel "buyer.buyerComtel", b.buyer_mail "buyer.buyerMail", b.buyer_zip "buyer.buyerZip", b.buyer_add1 "buyer.buyerAdd1", b.buyer_add2 "buyer.buyerAdd2", b.buyer_charger "buyer.buyerCharger" from prod p inner join lprod l on p.lprod_gu = l.lprod_gu inner join buyer b on p.buyer_id = b.buyer_id where prod_id = #{prodId}
mapper.insert:
select #{lprodGu} || lpad( nvl(to_number(substr(max(prod_id),4)),0) +1,6,'0') from prod where lprod_gu = #{lprodGu}
insert into prod ( prod_id, prod_name, lprod_gu, buyer_id, prod_cost, prod_price, prod_sale, prod_outline, prod_detail, prod_totalstock, prod_insdate, prod_properstock, prod_size, prod_color, prod_delivery, prod_unit, prod_qtyin, prod_qtysale, prod_mileage ) values ( #{prodId}, #{prodName}, #{lprodGu}, #{buyerId}, #{prodCost}, #{prodPrice}, #{prodSale}, #{prodOutline}, #{prodDetail}, #{prodTotalstock}, sysdate, #{prodProperstock}, #{prodSize}, #{prodColor}, #{prodDelivery}, #{prodUnit}, #{prodQtyin}, #{prodQtysale}, #{prodMileage} )
mapper.update: update prod set prod_name = #{prodName}, prod_cost = #{prodCost}, prod_price = #{prodPrice}, prod_sale = #{prodSale}, prod_outline = #{prodOutline}, prod_detail = #{prodDetail}, prod_totalstock = #{prodTotalstock}, prod_properstock = #{prodProperstock}, prod_size = #{prodSize}, prod_color = #{prodColor}, prod_delivery = #{prodDelivery}, prod_unit = #{prodUnit}, prod_qtyin = #{prodQtyin}, prod_qtysale = #{prodQtysale}, prod_mileage = #{prodMileage} where prod_id = #{prodId}
